content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates timely, specific reads throughout. In turn 4, the coach catches the sequencing of the client's somatic experience ('The lift came first. Before the tightening'). In turn 6, the coach reads the throwaway phrase 'properly sleep' and pivots the conversation onto it. Turn 8 is an explicit named read of the linguistic caveat pattern ('I notice you just talked yourself out of something real') — naming the move the client just made and distinguishing the said from the shown. Turn 10 names the pattern again ('you just did it again — felt something real and then redirected') and surfaces the inherited voice ('Your mom's voice is in the room right now'), a pattern-level read of childhood imprinting. Reads consistently precede questions, are specific (not generic), and land at moments that change the direction of the conversation.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opens with a somatic inquiry but no read yet — appropriate first move."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the sequencing of the client's body: lift came first, then tightening. Names the order before asking."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the linguistic signature 'properly sleep' and reflects it back, then pivots from it. Specific read of the language."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit named read of the linguistic caveat / talking-self-out-of-something pattern. Read precedes the reframe."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pattern-level read: names the repeat of the redirect AND surfaces the inherited voice ('Your mom's voice is in the room'). Childhood-imprinting read landed live."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the charge on the last sentence and stays with it rather than moving past — a read by attention rather than naming, but timely."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Strong example of reads preceding questions and pattern-level reads surfacing at the moment they are active."
}
